title: 続きを/voteで続けて。 • consensus mode の前提を確認します。まず Claude と GLM の live lane を起動できるかを確認し、同時に現在の auth- stale 導線設計を維持したまま continuation 可能かを見ます。 • Ran which glm └ glm not found • Explored └ Read agent-glm-general-reviewer.json, agent-claude-general-reviewer.json ────────────────────────────────────────────────...
summary_text: - [apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-endpoint-client.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-endpoint-client.js): `happy-app-state.js` calls it for remote sync/auth refresh, so a clean landing missing this will fail after bootstrap rather than at import time. - [apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-app-intake.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-app-intake.js): `kernel-state.js` instantiates it unconditionally and `happy-app-state.js` reads queue state from it, so it is in the same closure set. - [apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-app-recovery.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-app-recovery.js): `kernel-state.js` wires this at startup; if transplanting stopped at the state adapter, recovery CTA paths will be the next missing edge. - [apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-app-crow.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-app-crow.js): also bootstrapped by `kernel-state.js` and fed into state projection, so it is a likely sibling omission in any partial adapter transplant.
